ingredients_text: 44% pilau rice (water, basmati rice, rapeseed oil, turmeric powder, cumin seed, salt), 38% korma sauce (onion, 21% single cream (milk), water, yogurt (milk), coconut milk, tomato, rapeseed oil, ginger purée, cashew nut purée (water, cashews), desiccated coconut, garlic purée, coriander powder, tomato purée, sugar, coconut creamed, cumin, salt, cornflour, paprika, madras curry powder (coriander, turmeric, mustard, fenugreek, salt, cayenne pepper, celery seeds, clove, cornflour, paprika, pepper, onion, garlic, fennel, bay leaf), garam masala (coriander, cumin, ginger, black pepper, nutmeg, cloves, cardamom, bay leaf), turmeric, cumin seeds, chilli powder), 18% cooked chicken (chicken breast fillet, tapioca starch, salt), allergy advice for allergens, see ingredients in bold, may also contain other nuts and peanuts,
